title: rabbitgoo Dog Harness Large Dog No Pull Pet Harness with 2 Leash Clips, Adjustable Soft Padded Pet Vest Harness, Reflective No-Choke with Easy Control Handle for Training or Walking, Black, L
features: Large Dog Harness: Measuring neck girth: 46 - 66 cm, chest girth: 43 - 85 cm. Recommended breeds: Medium to large dogs, such as golden retriever, huskie, labrador, alaska, german shepherd, akita, etc. make your puppy stand out with this wonderful harness

No Pull, No Choke: Our no pulling dog harness is specially designed with 2 metal leash rings for safer dog walks. Use the chest attachment clip to stop your dog from pulling on walks, perfect for dog training or dogs who tend to pull. The back one is great for casual walks, jogging, hiking, etc

Easy to Use: This hassle-free overhead harness is easy to put on and take off with its 2 fast-release buckles. Slide the harness over your dog's head, buckle it up, adjust the straps, and here you go! Grab the top handle for additional control. Lightweight and easy to clean

Fully Adjustable: This adjustable harness features 4 easy adjusting straps around the body. You can use its 2 neck straps and 2 chest straps to create a perfect fit for your dog with some room for growth. No worries about slipping out or choking

Safe and Comfortable: Your dog will enjoy the daily walk in this comfortable dog harness! Made of nylon oxford and padded with a soft cushion to protect your dog's skin. Breathable air mesh keeps your dog cool during outdoor activities. Super bright reflective strips ensure a safe walk both day and night

Meet the harness, and enjoy the journey. Your Dog, Our Passion. Previous page Next page Many dogs love to take adventures or meet new furry friends. To take care of various outdoor exercise needs of these excitable dogs and puppies, a cozy and safe rabbitgoo dog harness is proudly designed. Wear it Like A Champ. Previous page Provide Extra Protection Having an excitable dog? Not a problem! Crafted of durable Oxford fabric, this harness could withstand plenty of pulling and tugging. And it won't fade or get damaged easily. Bring Ultimate Comfort Consist of breathable padded air mesh, the skin-friendly harness will keep the dog cool and cozy in all weather, while preventing skin irritation. Comfortable for active dogs that love to run. Next page By covering around the chest and back, the harness evenly distributes the force while pulling, keeping the dog always in control. Besides, it keeps the pressure away from the neck sensitive area, providing a more comfortable experience for your doggy. Connecting You and Your Dog. Previous page Front Clip for Anti-pulling The No-pull Chest Ring is designed to stop your dog from pulling - it helps redirect your dog's forward motion when he/she suddenly pulls. A perfect choice for dog training. Back Clip for All Occasions The functional Back D-Ring distributes pressure around the chest, relieving dogs from unnecessary discomfort. Ideal for jogging, running, or casual play. Next page There are two metal leash attachments on the harness for confident leash control, satisfying all kinds of daily walking, training, and outdoor adventure needs. How to Make the Harness Snugly Fit Quick and Easy Measure Your Dog Before Purchasing A-Neck Girth：Measure the widest portion of the neck to the greatest extent possible. B-Chest Girth：The chest was measured approximately two finger widths away from the dog's front legs. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. Then slider the harness over your dog's head, and arrange the bottom straps between dog's two front legs, under the belly. Finally, lock in the buckles on both two sides. Quick and Easy Easy Adjustment for A Suitable Fit If the harness is too loose, the dog may easily escape. However, if the harness is too tight, the dog may feel discomfort or even get hurt. We recommend adjusting the neck and chest strap to an appropriate position with a 2-finger Rule : You should be able to fit two fingers between the harness and your dog's body. Loose the neck strap to get a wider Neck Girth. The slider should be away from the handle. Tighten the neck strap to get a smaller Neck Girth. The slider should be close to the handle. Quick and Easy How to Adjust the Chest Strap? Loose the chest strap to get a wider Chest Girth. The slider should be close to the handle. Tighten the chest strap to get a smaller Chest Girth.
